name: icon_coin
description: The game's soft-currency identity: a single gold PAW-PRINT coin, front-facing — a chunky round gold coin with a bold embossed cat-paw print, subtle knitted-texture rim, restrained shine (no letters).

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, cozier tones and a touch more craft detail

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly simpler, more minimal composition with bolder shapes
